name: @obelisk/openclaw-plugin
description: OpenClaw native plugin exposing Obelisk context packing, command-output compression, symbol lookup, restore handles, and stats as agent tools.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate:check: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js --check && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
